title: Central RTE (Amendment) Rules , 2017

L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (i) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 127] ubZ fnYyh] cq/okj] iQjojh 22] 2017@iQkYxqu 3] 1938 No. 127] NEW DELHI, WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 22, 2017/PHALGUNA 3, 1938 मानव सं साधन िवकास मंᮢ ालय (᭭ कूल िशᭃा और साᭃरता िवभाग) अिधसूचना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 20 फरवरी, 2017 सा.का.िन. 155(अ).—िनःशु᭨क और अिनवायᭅ बाल िशᭃा का अिधकार अिधिनयम, 2009 (2009 का 35) कᳱ धारा 38 ᳇ारा ᮧदᱫ अिधकारᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए के᭠ᮤ ीय सरकार िनःशु᭨क और अिनवायᭅ बाल िशᭃा का अिधकार िनयम, 2010 मᱶ िन᳜िलिखत संशोधन करती है, नामतः- 1. लघु शीषᭅ और आरंभः- (1) इन िनयमᲂ को िनःशु᭨क और अिनवायᭅ बाल िशᭃा का अिधकार (संशोधन) िनयम, 2017 कहा जाएगा। (2) ये राजकᳱय राजपᮢ मᱶ इनके ᮧकाशन कᳱ ितिथ से ᮧवृᱫ हᲂगे। 2. िनःशु᭨क और अिनवायᭅ बाल िशᭃा का अिधकार िनयम, 2010 के ᮧारंिभक िशᭃा कᳱ पाᲹचयाᭅ और उसे पूरा करने से संबंिधत भाग VII मᱶ िनयम 23, उप-िनयम (2) के खंड (ग) के ᭭ थान पर िन᳜िलिखत खंड ᮧित᭭थािपत ᳰकए जाएंगे, नामतः- “(ग) सभी ᮧारंिभक कᭃाᲐ के िलए कᭃा-वार, िवषय-वार अिधगम पᳯरणाम तैयार करना; और (घ) पᳯरभािषत अिधगम पᳯरणामᲂ को ᮧा᳙ करने के िलए सतत् औ र ᳞ ापक मू᭨यांकन को अमल मᱶ लाने के िलए ᳰदशा-िनदᱷश तैयार करना।” [फा.सं. 16-3/2016-ईई-17/ईई-13/ईई-4] रीना रे, अपर सिचव ᳯट᭡पणीः- अिधसूचना सं᭎या सा.का.िन. 301 (ई), ᳰदनांक 8 अᮧैल, 2010 के जᳯरए भारत के राजपᮢ के भाग II, खंड-3, उपखंड (i), ᳰदनांक 9 अᮧैल, 2010 मᱶ मूल िनयम ᮧकािशत ᳰकए गए थे। -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF HUMAN RESOURCE DEVELOPMENT (Department of School Education and Literacy) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 20th February, 2017. G.S.R 155(E).—In exercise of the power conferred by section 38 of the Right of Children to Free and Compulsory Education Act, 2009 (35 of 2009), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the Right of Children to Free and Compulsory Education Rules, 2010, namely:- 1. Short title and commencement:- (1) These rules may be called the Right of Children to Free and Compulsory Education (Amendment) Rules, 2017. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Right of Children to Free and Compulsory Education Rules, 2010 in Part VII relating to Curriculum and Completion of Elementary Education, in rule 23, in sub-rule (2) for clause (c), the following clauses shall be substituted, namely :- “(c) prepare class-wise, subject-wise learning outcomes for all elementary classes; and (d) prepare guidelines for putting into practice continuous and comprehensive evaluation, to achieve the defined learning outcomes.”. [F.No. 16-3/2016-EE-17/EE-13/EE-4] RINA RAY, Addl. Secy. Note:- The principal rules were published vide notification number G.S.R. 301(E), dated the 8th April, 2010 in the Gazette of India, Part II, Section 3, Sub-Section (i), dated the 9th April, 2010. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
